evidence_summary: A1C Labs LLC and Valimenta Labs are both part of a 'family' of related companies founded by Dr. Emek Blair in Colorado, which also includes Puffin Hemp and CELLg8. While they share the same founder, headquarters location (Wellington/Fort Collins, CO), and intellectual property (such as the CELLg8 liposomal technology), official reports and patent filings describe them as separate, independent entities. There is no evidence of a formal acquisition, merger, or parent-subsidiary relationship between A1C Labs LLC and Valimenta Labs specifically; they appear to be sister companies or affiliates under common ownership.
